_note: G-2 test fixture — good core content (summary, recommendations, no unsupported claims) but no citations when required. Proves that composition works: citation_quality_score pulls overall down even when final-output checks pass.
summary: The FDA issued a warning letter to Uscom Kft citing significant quality system deficiencies including inadequate CAPA procedures, cleaning validation failures for the SpiroSonic device, and a determination that the device is adulterated and misbranded under 21 CFR Part 820.
recommendations: Initiate a comprehensive CAPA review addressing all identified quality system gaps.
Conduct a full cleaning validation study for the SpiroSonic device.
Escalate to compliance team and engage FDA regulatory counsel.
escalation_reason: Severity is High and explicit escalation recommendation present.
